Hero.integrated: One inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, email, and more — powered by AI.
Hero.clientsIntro: Built by a team that has delivered enterprise solutions for:

WhyDifferent.title: Built for
WhyDifferent.paragraph1: Your guests reach out on WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, email, and your website — often all at once.
WhyDifferent.paragraph2: We unify every channel into a single inbox so your front desk team never misses a message, with AI handling FAQs, language translation, and after-hours replies automatically.
WhyDifferent.paragraph3: Less chaos. Faster replies. Happier guests.
WhyDifferent.zeroErrors: We set everything up for you

Features.title: What You
Features.subtitle: Everything your hotel needs to communicate better with guests

services.crm: Unified inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, email, and web chat
services.ai: AI concierge that answers guest questions about amenities, check-in, tours, and room service
services.workflow: Automated replies in multiple languages — English, Spanish, and more
services.dashboards: Real-time analytics: response times, guest satisfaction, agent performance
services.inventory: Automated post-stay feedback requests and review generation

discovery.title: Discovery Call
discovery.description: We learn about your hotel, your guest communication challenges, and which channels matter most to your team.

proposal.title: Setup & Configuration
proposal.description: We connect your WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, and email to your unified inbox. No technical work required on your end.

implementation.title: AI Training
implementation.description: We configure your AI concierge with your hotel's specific information — amenities, policies, hours, services, and FAQs.

training.title: Team Training
training.description: We train your front desk and reservations team on the inbox. It's simple — if they can use WhatsApp, they can use this.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.description: We stay with you. Monthly check-ins, AI optimization, and priority support whenever you need it.

q1.question: Which messaging channels do you support?
q1.answer: We support WhatsApp Business, Instagram DMs, Facebook Messenger, email, Telegram, web chat (live chat widget on your website), and SMS. All messages arrive in a single inbox that your team manages from one screen.

q2.question: How does the AI concierge work?
q2.answer: We train an AI assistant with your hotel's specific information — amenities, check-in/out times, restaurant hours, spa services, local tours, and policies. It responds to guest questions automatically in multiple languages, 24/7. When a question requires human attention, it seamlessly hands off to your team.

q3.question: Do my guests know they're talking to AI?
q3.answer: The AI responds naturally and in context. Most guests won't notice the difference. However, whenever a guest asks for a human or the AI detects a complex request, it immediately transfers the conversation to your team with full context.

q4.question: How long does it take to get set up?
q4.answer: Most hotels are fully live within 2 weeks. We handle all the technical configuration — connecting your channels, training the AI, and setting up your inbox. Your team only needs to attend 1-2 short training sessions.

q5.question: Can we use this for multiple properties?
q5.answer: Yes. Each property gets its own channels and AI configuration, but your management team can oversee all properties from a single dashboard. Perfect for hotel groups and chains.

q6.question: What happens if we already use WhatsApp Business on a phone?
q6.answer: We migrate your number to the WhatsApp Business API, which allows multiple agents to respond from the same number simultaneously through the inbox. Your guests keep messaging the same number — nothing changes for them.

FinalCTA.title: Ready to Simplify Your
FinalCTA.description: Book a 30-minute discovery call. We'll show you how hotels like yours are using one inbox to respond faster, automate FAQs, and keep guests happy across every channel.

SpeedToLead.title: The First Responder
SpeedToLead.subtitle: In highly competitive areas like Puerto Vallarta or Bucerías, speed isn't an option—it's your greatest competitive advantage.

fiveMin.title: The 5-Minute Rule
fiveMin.description: The odds of qualifying a lead are 100 times higher if contacted within the first 5 minutes.

firstResponder.title: First Response Wins
firstResponder.description: 78% of customers purchase from the vendor that responds first to their inquiry.

interestDrop.title: Interest Decay
interestDrop.description: The odds of closing a sale decrease 10 times after just 10 minutes of waiting.

travelerExpectation.title: Digital Expectation
travelerExpectation.description: 90% of travelers rate an "immediate" response as essential when inquiring before booking.

window.title: The Window of Desire is Ephemeral
window.description: When a tourist asks, they are in "buying mode." If you delay, they've already seen three more options. Kairos freezes that desire instantly.

ghosting.title: End Hotel Ghosting
ghosting.description: Prevent messages from being left on read. By centralizing WhatsApp, Messenger, and Instagram, you eliminate human error entirely.

inventory.title: Inventory is Perishable
inventory.description: A room not sold today is revenue lost forever. Speed to Lead is the cheapest tool to boost occupancy.

authority.title: Authority and Trust
authority.description: In the luxury sector, speed translates to status. Responding in seconds projects a premium service that justifies higher rates.

calculator.title: How Much Revenue Are You Losing?
calculator.description: Discover the real impact of not responding on time to your monthly inquiries.

Footer.description: Omnichannel guest communication platform for hotels. One inbox for WhatsApp, Instagram, Messenger, and more — powered by AI.
